title: Bitcoin for Everyone
description:
Bitcoin is no longer niche - it’s a force reshaping finance, business, and global economies. But for most people, it still feels complex and inaccessible. Bitcoin for Everyone is designed to change that. This course breaks down Bitcoin’s history, mechanics, and impact into simple, practical lessons that anyone can grasp - whether you’re a business leader, investor, policymaker, or just curious about the future of money.

You’ll learn how transactions work, how to set up and secure a Bitcoin wallet, and how Bitcoin fits into the broader financial system. We’ll explore its economic significance, the regulatory debates shaping its future, and what its rise means for industries from banking to entrepreneurship.

The Bitcoin market is projected to grow from USD 16.43 billion in 2025 to USD 28.22 billion by 2030 (Mordor Intelligence), creating a growing need for professionals and informed citizens who understand its opportunities and risks.

By the end, you won’t just “know about Bitcoin” - you’ll be confident discussing, using, and applying it in real-world contexts. No technical expertise required, just curiosity and a willingness to learn.
